With her face closer to mine than I thought, I turned towards the sky again to hide my

I wondered, what was she feeling, what was she thinking, right in this moment?
Even though there should be lots for us to talk about, to ask each other about.
None of it came out of my mouth, everything just turned into air and disappeared.
It doesn't have to be everytime, okay?

But how about we gather here regularly, just to chat?
Charmed by her serious tone, my gaze met hers again.
And this time I didn't pull it back.
\SE[29]We could talk stuff that happened during the day, the happy stuff, the fun stuff...
even the sad stuff. No, anything is fine, I don't care what it is.
\se[22]I want to talk to you lots more, more than we do now, \n[1].
And you know? ...I want you to, know more about me too.
\se[32-nb]At least, I want to... know more about you, \n[1].
My pounding heart, my hot cheeks... and my sweaty palms.
I wished for her to not notice any of it.
Wringing out the words that my dry throat would normally stop in their tracks,
I want to, know more about you too, Shino.
I want to, know more about you too, Shino.
\SE[33-nb]Eheheh, thanks. I'm... I'm so happy, right now~.
Looking at the soft smile spreading across her face, I felt an indescribable sense of joy.
This might have been the first time... that I clearly recognized my own feelings.
That "So this is what it feels like, to fall in love"
I still don't have the courage to tell her clearly just yet.
But for the day that will surely come someday, I won't forget what occured here today.
As the night drew on, we spent a bit more time together,
nestled together just by ourselves, with the partition between us.

won't always be together through the sheer inertia of our lives.
\se[29-nb]I mean, I know that nobody really knows what the future holds.

\SE[54-nb]Nnn, no, it's nothing. I'm sorry. Forget what I was saying.
I don't think it's a question I should ask just yet.
I felt the tension leaving my body, being replaced with relief.
At the same time... I felt a bit disgusted at myself, for being so craven.
\SE[14]Sorry for interrupting our chat like that. It's getting pretty late, let's go to sleep.

...I'll bring it up again then, okay?

think I can make my words have much weight at all...

I was looking forward to teasing her with a [You sure took your time]
while staring up at the night sky when...
Huh... damn, suddenly I'm feeling sleepy...
Unable to resist the sudden rush of drowsiness, my eyelids drooped down.
Thankfully, the balcony railing's quite high. There's nothing
stopping me from leaning against it and going to sleep but...
If Shino comes in just at that time... Aah, damn, I can't.
I threw out all my thoughts and closed my eyes.
Who knows, she might not come tonight anyway...
It took me a bit to finish up all the housework. Sorry... Wuh--
\sa[125]\SE[8]Oh dearie, guess I showed up a bit too late... I'm sorry~
\SE[14-nb]But you waited for me, didn't you? Eheheh... I'm so happy.
\SE[10]Hey, are you really asleep? You're not just pretending, right?
\SE[15-nb]Since you're asleep, you can't hear me even if I talk to myself, right?
\SE[0]\n[1]. Thanks for always being so sweet and kind to me.

\sa[128]\SE[10]...That didn't wake you up, right? Good--

...Maybe a mosquito got me while I was asleep.

leaned against the railing side by side.

\sa[123]\SE[26]Me? I was actually playing a game the whole time.

"Fufuhn~", she puffed out her chest. She actually takes care of
both her studies and the housework properly, so I couldn't say a word.
\SE[42]Back when I did actually do that and refused to come out of my room,
you used to cross over here and come see me, didn't you?
She said, while pointing at the partition between us.
It's just an old memory now but, thinking back to it,
I really did some pretty dangerous things back then, huh?
You can't shrug off a fall from this height... can you?
\SE[26]...It's not like I want you to do dangerous stuff for my sake but,
it really did make me happy at that time, you know.
\SE[14]It really surprised me, that there was someone out there who'd do
something that dangerous just for the sake of someone so worthless like me.
\se[39-nb]Ah, I mean back then, okay? I don't think that way about myself now.
...Since you changed my mind about it.
[You couldn't have helped it], or so I almost said, but I swallowed the words back in.
Because she'd just end up comparing herself, either to Rino nee-san or Ayano-san.
\se[29-nb]\SA[130]...C-Come to think of it, I shoved that hoodie from back then onto you, didn't I?
Eheheh, have you thrown it away already? Sorry, for just shoving that onto you.
\SE[42]Back then, I still couldn't accept the person that I was... But I
couldn't just throw away a part of my self, so I ended up throwing it at you.
...I told her, that I still had it, and that I kept it close.
Specifically, it's just in my closet, of course.
...I think the me of back then was very important, for the sake
of me growing into what I am today. That's how I think now.
\SE[21]And I'd say that's all... no, I'm definitely sure that it's all thanks to you.
\SE[24]I've received so much from you, that I can never pay you back for.
\SE[54-nb]Hey, say, have I... managed to ever give anything like that to you?
I want to know if I've managed to repay even a bit of the kindness that you've showed me.
\SE[39]It was a really sudden question, wasn't it? I'm so...
-- I'm the one who can't repay you for all that you've done for me.
But it's difficult for me to express all my overflowing gratitude properly.
So instead, I tried to pack it all into the fewest words possible.
Thanks, for all you do for me.
Thanks, for all you do for me.
\SE[54-nb]T-Those are my words... Thanks, for always being there for me.
\SE[54-nb]Sorry for asking about that weird stuff, okay?
I think I'm gonna... go back in for today.
\SE[24]Thanks for listening to me. See you tomorrow... No, I mean, today... okay?

I watched as she ran off back into her room, with her face hidden behind her hands.
If it was stressing her out enough that she'd cry, I should have been honest much sooner.
Of course, I did try to put it all into a single expression but...
In the end, there was just too much gratitude inside me for that.
Hoping that I could start repaying her kindness from now on bit by bit,
I returned back to my room.

She waved her hand towards me. Did she notice me opening and closing the door?
...As usual, it was the same time, and the same scenery.

\SE[11]Really, it's nothing that big of a deal.

\se[16-nb]But sometimes, when you compare yourself to them, you end up wondering

I started listing off one of her charms and good points after another, as I thought of them,
to assure her that she doesn't need to worry about stupid stuff like this,
considering I can list off this many of them without really thinking about it.
So I kept going on and on for several minutes, hoping that she'd understand that.
\sa[128]\SE[11]Eheheh... I see. Mm, so that's how you see me, huh?
\se[9]Thanks... Now I feel stupid for worrying so much about it.
In stark contrast to before, she was looking much more cheerful now.
As they say, those who don't work lose the right to
\SE[11]Hey, I think I just realized something.

\se[14-nb]Aah~, I really am no match for you. Fufuh--, thanks.
After that, as if her terrible mood earlier was a lie, I spent the
rest of the night casually chatting with a widely smiling Shino.
-- She's usually out by this time.
I looked at the clock one last time before heading out to the balcony,
and tried to peer across to see if Shino was there.
The chat notification sound went off. Thinking it might be from
Shino, I took out my phone and checked and...
Just as I thought, it was a RIME from Shino.
A request? I wonder what sort of request it is.
Shino, wants to come to my room... this late?
I don't get why, but assuming it's not a joke... let's just wait and see.
Hang on, I feel like I got a message from my old man
earlier today, saying that he'd be out all day on a business trip.
Late night + Shino + My room + My father's not home = ????
For now, I communicated my consent and left the door open for her.
At times like these, it's always nothing special, nothing serious at all.
...Can't get my hopes up, can't get my hopes up.

Could you, let me stay the night at your room, \n[1], sir?
\sa[126]\se[31-nb]You see, it's uhm... though it's embarrassing to admit this,
I was playing a horror game and it was a bit too scary, you see?
\sa[130]\SE[20]And as such, I am unable to go to sleep alone... and onee-chan
probably has work tomorrow again so I can't bother her so--
...I think Rino nee-san would still pull her into her bed instantly, even
if she did have work the next day.
---- But in that case, her chastity would end up being at risk instead.
After hearing her explanation and regaining some exposure, I
responded with a [It can't be helped] and accepted it-- when I realized something.
Indeed, an explanation of it doesn't change the situation at all.
...We'll still be spending the night together under the same roof like this.
...I've always been weak to those tear filled eyes.
I can never refuse her when she's like this.
It'll be fine as long as I maintain my will of steel and treat her like a gentleman.
\SM[double]\SE[20]Thankssss~~~! I'll definitely make it up to you--....
She put her hands together, leaned forward, and thanked me.
My eyes were sucked right into the cleavage peaking out from under her shirt.
(This is gonna be more impossible than impossible...)
Still, we're childhood friends that have been together for a long time now.
Even in this situation full of all sorts of chances, we continued
to chat aimlessly like always, and it eventually became
sleep time without a single incident.
\SE[54-nb]Well then, it's sleep time, I guess. It's a bit chilly today so,
let me just put on my jammies.... there.

No way in hell. I really won't be able to call myself a man if I let her do that...
I pointed my thumb at the bed, and urged her to use it.
\sa[123]\SE[8]Fueh? It's fine, it's fine--. I'm the one who's intruding on you,

We both collapsed onto the bed, with me on top of her, as if pushing her down.
Huh, I can't move. Sorry, can you....
Uhm, hey, \n[1]? You're making a really scary face, you know? Hey...
This is bad. Badbadbadbadbadbad--. My head understands
that I gotta move, but my body won't listen.
Her soft body, her sweet scent... Everything about her is
trying its best to get me to throw reason out of the window.
\n[1]? Any further and... we won't, b-be able to pass it off as a joke, you know?
I know that. I know that but....
If you promise to take responsibility... then I...
...I clear my throat... and just as I'm about to nod...
I smack my own cheek, and roll onto the floor.
I apologized to her, and then took a deep breath.
The tingling pain in my cheek slowly but surely brought
my loosened mind and reason back to reality.
\SE[54-nb]No. I know. You just treasure me that much, don't you?
I don't know if I got carried away by the mood and didn't feel like

\SE[38]Eheheh, I don't really feel scared of that horror game anymore.
I think I'm gonna go back to my room.
I would be grateful if she could. If this happens again--
\SE[33-nb]Thanks for letting me into your room, okay? See you later then.

\sa[124]\SM[pop]\SE[32]It's almost time for our summer vacation, huh~?
\se[13-nb]It's free attendance right now so it's kinda like summer vacation but,
I think it'll hit different when it actually gets to summer vacation officially.
\SE[2]Hey, what should we do this summer? We could go to the carnival~, see fireworks together~.
The sea sounds nice too~. Or maybe we could play games all night until morning~?
\se[14-nb]I want to go somwhere fun with onee-chan and mom too~.
Ah, of course, I won't skip on my studies or my part time job.
\SE[11]...But our summer this year, will be a tiny bit different than usual, won't it?
I want to do all sorts of stuff with lots of people but....
Suddenly, she turned to look straight at me, our gazes met, and my heart started pounding.
\sa[128]\SE[0]Most importantly, I want to make lots and lots of memories with you, \n[1].
Hey, how about you? Is there anything you wanna do?
Things I want to do during summer....
I'd be fine going out and hanging out with my friends, and also wouldn't mind
just lazing around at home. I could also get a part time job myself.
All sorts of options pop up and disappear in my head. And in the few that remain,
there's always the same person that's laughing beside me in each of them.
It's a bit embarrassing to say it out loud but, since she took the
first step herself, I gotta return the favour with the same enthusiasm.
I want to go to all sorts of places with you, Shino.
I want to go to all sorts of places with you, Shino.
\SE[2]Really? I see. Because if you really feel that way... I'd be really happy.

We'll do everything that we could ever possibly want to.
I think that'd be realistically impossible. But still, I can't help
but smile at the idea of spending a summer with her.
\se[14-nb]You know, ever since we got together like this, things
have been a whole lot fun in life~
We'd been family until now so, I didn't really think there would
be so many new changes when we became a 'temp couple'.
I never thought that our everyday lives would change so much for the better.
I could only hope that we could keep being together like this.
"Eternity" is a word that nobody out there's been able to fulfill, so there was no
way that the two of us, not even adults, could swear that to each other.
